Bus Timings

Rashidiya Bus Station in Dubai: A Traveler’s Guide

February 9, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Rashidiya Bus Station is a key transport hub located in the bustling Al Rashidiya area of Dubai. It serves as a major stop for travelers, offering easy access to various destinations across the city and beyond.

Address

Al Rashidiya, Dubai United Arab Emirates

Call Center Number: 8009090

Email: ask@rta. ae

View Al Rashidiya Bus Station Location on Google Map Here.

Located in Al Rashidiya, the Rashidiya Bus Station is a crucial transit point in Dubai’s public transportation network. Its proximity to shopping centers, government buildings, and educational institutions makes it a convenient hub for both residents and visitors in the area.

Bus Routes and Timings

Below is a list of the key bus routes:

Bus Route Stops
F03 Mirdif Etihad Mall, Uptown Mirdif
F05 Mizhar Arabian Center
F06 Rashidiya -
F10 Al Warqa Etihad Mall, Uptown Mirdif, City Centre Mirdif
F60 Mirdif Uptown Mirdif, City Centre Mirdif
F61 Al Warqa -
11B Al Awir Mushrif Park
20 Al Nahda to Al Warsan International City, Dragon Mart
44 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Rashidiya Sharaf DG, BurJuman, Oud Metha Metro Stations
310 International City Dragon Mart
320 Dubai Outsource City Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai Academic City
367 Etisalat Bus Station to Dubai Silicon Oasis Mirdif City Centre, Dragon Mart, Dubai Academic City
102 Seasonal bus service to Global Village -

Bus Route Details

Rashidiya Bus Station is serviced by a wide range of bus routes, providing convenient transportation options for travelers heading to key areas in Dubai. Some of the major routes include:

  • F03: Mirdif Stops at Etihad Mall and Uptown Mirdif.

  • F05: Mizhar Stops at Arabian Center.
  • F06: Rashidiya.
  • F10: Al Warqa Stops at Etihad Mall, Uptown Mirdif, and City Centre Mirdif.
  • F60: Mirdif Stops at Uptown Mirdif and City Centre Mirdif.
  • F61: Al Warqa.

Additional services from Centrepoint Metro Station/Rashidiya Bus Station include:

  • 11B: Al Awir Stops at Mushrif Park.

  • 20: Al Nahda to Al Warsan Stops at International City and Dragon Mart.
  • 44: Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Rashidiya Stops at Sharaf DG, BurJuman, and Oud Metha Metro Stations.
  • 310: International City Stops at Dragon Mart.
  • 320: Dubai Outsource City Stops at Dubai Silicon Oasis and Dubai Academic City.
  • 367: Etisalat Bus Station to Dubai Silicon Oasis Stops at Mirdif City Centre, Dragon Mart, and Dubai Academic City.
  • 102: Seasonal bus service to Global Village.

These routes provide frequent service throughout the day, ensuring accessibility for both early and late travelers.

Nearby Destinations

The Rashidiya Bus Station is surrounded by a range of local amenities, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and healthcare services, making it a convenient stop for travelers on the go.

Restaurants

  • Talk of the Town Restaurant: A popular spot for casual dining.

  • Cafeteria Khalil: Known for quick snacks and beverages.
  • Fajita Grill Restaurant: Offers a variety of grilled dishes.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Government Buildings

  • Al Rashidiya Police Station: Providing law enforcement services in the area.

  • General Directorate of Residency and Foreigners Affairs: A key government office nearby.

Educational Institutions

  • Al Eman Private School: A well-known school in the area.

  • Sarah Girls School: A local educational institution serving the community.

Healthcare

  • Al Rashidiya Health Centre: Offers healthcare services for residents and visitors.

Leisure

  • Al Rashidiya Park: A great recreational spot for families and individuals looking for outdoor activities.

Shopping Centers

  • Al Rashidiya Centre: A local shopping destination.

  • Bin Sougat Centre: Offers a variety of retail stores and services.

Landmarks

  • Al Rashidiya Library: A notable local library.

  • Royal Air Wing: A significant building in the area.

Nearby Stops

  1. Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 5(41m): 320

  2. Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 4(56m): 44, F05, F06

  3. Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 9(64m): 310, F03

  4. Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 3(83m): 11, 16, 20A, 20B, 25, 36A, 36B, N30

  5. centrepoint Metro Station 2(84m): MRed1, MRed2

Rashidiya Bus Station is more than just a transport hub; it’s a central point that connects commuters to vital services and attractions in Dubai. Whether you’re traveling for work, leisure, or running errands, Rashidiya Bus Station ensures you can navigate the city with ease and convenience. Rashidiya Bus Station offers frequent and reliable services, making it an essential part of Dubai’s transportation network.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 9, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
